hero.headline: Quiet luxury for moments together
hero.subheadline: 22 years of experience welcoming families to the Ardennes

quietLuxury.title: Quiet Luxury
quietLuxury.description: Ensuite bathrooms, solid oak floors and timeless interiors. No frills, just genuine quality you can feel.

kitchen.title: Professional Kitchen
kitchen.description: 2x Miele dishwashers, Lacanche stove and everything you need to cook together for 26 people.

garden.title: Kids Paradise Garden
garden.description: 200m x 100m of space, playground equipment, football field and a treasure hunt. Kids entertain themselves for hours.

mattresses.title: Premium Mattresses
mattresses.description: Boxspring beds with thick mattresses for a perfect night's sleep. Waking up rested is the foundation of a successful stay.

dishCabinet.title: Checked After Every Guest
dishCabinet.description: After every guest, we fully inspect the dish cabinet. Everything is complete and in perfect condition when you arrive.

professionalEquipment.title: Professional Equipment
professionalEquipment.description: Restaurant-quality pots and pans. Cook for 26 people with the right equipment.

livingOnSite.title: 25 Years On-Site
livingOnSite.description: We have lived on the estate for 25 years. Nobody knows the house and surroundings better than we do.

whyBookDirect.title: Why book direct?
whyBookDirect.subtitle: The benefits of booking directly with us

price.title: Best price guaranteed
price.description: No OTA commissions means the best price for you

contact.title: Direct contact with us
contact.description: Questions? We know the house like no one else
